hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Start with the widest container (left = 0, right = n-1). Move the pointer with the **shorter** height inward — moving the taller one can only decrease area.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: At each step, area = `min(height[left], height[right]) * (right - left)`. Update the maximum and move the shorter-side pointer.
